MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Tenderloin Neighborhood Development is present. Represented by Ledell Stewart.
Attorney, Michael Rossoff, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, London Wildwind, is present.
Attorney, Joshua Olson , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Penelope Pahl, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-04-2010 is vacated.
